server_mix_test.details: Command failed because server/config/test.exs is missing.

server_mix_compile.details: Compiled successfully after adding the builder destination-chat tool and shared DM ensure helper; only pre-existing warnings were reported.

server_builder_destination_chat_tool.details: Added builder tool `ensure_destination_chat`, shared `Chat.ensure_dm_chat/2`, and DM-only chat resolution so the standalone agent can create/reuse a real attached DM chat and return its chat id.

server_builder_destination_chat_validati.details: Added builder tool `validate_destination_chat` so the standalone agent re-checks live attached/default destination chats, compares a provided chat id against current owner-visible state, repairs stale default destinations when needed, and explains why the same DM id can still be correct.

server_owner_visible_attached_chats.details: Owner-facing attached/default destination chats now only include chats shared by both the agent shadow user and the owner, preventing the builder from returning invisible-but-writable chat ids.

server_builder_struct_sanitization.details: Builder payload sanitization now compiles with explicit handling for DateTime, NaiveDateTime, Date, Time, Decimal, and fallback structs.

server_agent_secret_endpoint.details: The authenticated GET /api/agents/:id/secret route compiles and returns the decrypted callback signing secret for the owning user.

mobile_git_diff_check.details: git diff --check passed for the modified native agent view, config panel, notes files, and agent secret endpoint files.

mobile_typescript_check.details: `./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json --pretty false` reports existing repo-wide TypeScript errors outside the touched native agent files, including FlashList typing, NativeChatAppearance shape, old temp files, and relay typing issues.

ios_native_validation.details: No iOS build/test command was run from this workspace for cached secret reuse after agent creation, copy before rotate, the detached glass secret cover, the masked header edge treatment, the secret reveal/copy/rotate flow, the stream failure handling, or the stop button.
